testcase.name: put then get within same transaction returns the written value
Aborted value is NOT visible to new transaction
Non-conflicting writes on different keys both commit successfully
Delete makes key invisible to subsequent transactions
begin() assigns monotonically increasing snapshot timestamps
begin() returns a transaction with unique monotonic ID
Committed value is visible to new transaction
Snapshot isolation: reader does not see concurrent write committed after its begin
Multiple puts to same key within transaction: last write wins
Write-write conflict: first committer wins, second is aborted
